Method–provenance summary
Property: total electronic energy after geometry optimization (eV)
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding)
Geometry provenance: same run – geometry fully relaxed with ASE BFGS (fmax target 0.05 eV Å⁻¹) in 4 steps; optimized structure written to /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/geometry-optimize-validation/formaldehyde/20260624-114555_formaldehyde_geometry_optimize/formaldehyde_xtb_opt.xyz
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Backend: xtb engine via chemkit geometry-optimize skill (cli invocation: /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py opt --method xtb …)
Convergence: converged = true; n_steps = 4; no engine warnings.
Live log: the run streamed to a geometry-optimize-generated .out file in the caller’s working directory (announced at job launch), which can be tailed for the full SCF and optimizer transcript.

Headline result
Total energy (GFN2-xTB, gas-phase, optimized geometry): −195.25932 eV
